task_completion.description: Verify a chart window is open for the instrument MSFT.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A NinjaTrader chart window is visible with 'MSFT' displayed in the window title bar, chart tab, or the top-left corner of the chart panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the chart timeframe is set to Daily.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart header, tab, or Data Series configuration window shows 'Daily', '1 Day', or 'D' next to the instrument name.

task_completion.description: Verify the chart uses the Kagi bar type with a 3-point reversal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart displays step-like Kagi lines (vertical lines connected by horizontal segments, no standard candlesticks). Additionally, the Data Series window or chart header explicitly shows 'Kagi' and a reversal value of '3'.

task_completion.description: Verify a 20-period Simple Moving Average (SMA) is overlaid on the price panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A continuous indicator line is drawn directly over the Kagi price bars in the main panel, and the indicator legend in the top-left of the chart shows 'SMA' with a period of '20' (e.g., 'SMA(20)').

task_completion.description: Verify a Stochastics indicator (D=3, K=14, Smooth=3) is added in a separate panel below the chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There is a distinct sub-panel below the main price chart containing two oscillating lines. The legend for this sub-panel shows 'Stochastics' with parameters matching 14, 3, 3 (e.g., 'Stochastics(14, 3, 3)' or similar ordering).

task_completion.description: Verify the workspace configuration has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Control Center's 'Workspaces' menu is shown with the agent clicking 'Save', a 'Save Workspace' dialog is visible and confirmed, or the active workspace name in the Control Center lacks an asterisk (*) which would indicate unsaved changes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NinjaTrader 8 graphical user interface to configure the chart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show NinjaTrader 8 menus, Data Series dialogs, and Indicator configuration windows being actively used, rather than a terminal window or text editor modifying XML configuration files.

integrity.description: Verify the chart and indicators are genuinely rendered by the trading platform.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart window should display actual data rendering (axes, gridlines, drawn indicators) consistent with NinjaTrader's UI, not a static pasted image or a blank chart with no data loaded.

integrity.description: Verify the application used is NinjaTrader 8.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window styling, Control Center, and logo/icons match NinjaTrader 8, ensuring the agent didn't use a different charting tool or web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring a NinjaTrader 8 chart for MSFT using daily data from Jan 2023 to Dec 2024. Key visual targets: Chart type must be Kagi with a 3-point reversal. Indicators must include an SMA (period 20) on the main price panel and Stochastics (K=14, D=3, Smooth=3) in a lower sub-panel. Note: The provided MSFT data has slight synthetic price discrepancies compared to real-world Yahoo Finance data (e.g., Dec 31, 2024 close is 421.50 instead of 417.46). Do not penalize if the exact price levels differ slightly from standard historical records; focus strictly on verifying the UI configuration values (Kagi, 3, SMA 20, Stoch 14/3/3) and the visual presence of the indicators.
